Package io.jans.as.server.authzen.ws.rs

Class AccessEvaluationSearchService

java.lang.Object
io.jans.as.server.authzen.ws.rs.AccessEvaluationSearchService
@ApplicationScoped public class AccessEvaluationSearchService extends Object
AuthZEN Search Service. Handles search operations for subjects, resources, and actions.
Author:
Yuriy Z
